arts.ttl: Bayern vs Leverkusen: Olise or Wirtz? Kompany or Alonso? Kane on fire
arts.sum: Bayern Munich face Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga on Saturday in what promises to be an enthralling encounter, live on Sky Sports Football.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal could line up with Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Arteta has curated arguably the best defensive unit in world football over the past few years, with David Raya, William Saliba and Gabriel Magalhaes at the heart of Arsenal’s recent improvement. However, if Arteta wants to improve Arsenal’s slight attacking woes, then starting Wirtz and Odegaard alongside each other would help massively.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives update on squad – including Neuer – ahead of Leverkusen clash
arts.sum: At a press conference on Friday, Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany provided an update on his team, including Manuel Neuer, ahead of Saturday's top-of-the-table clash with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany explains the steps he took to become a coach
arts.sum: “There was an option to remain at the big clubs and continue a youth team trajectory to then, hopefully, maybe promote back to the top, but I went straight into the job and I learned to deal with changing squads, young players, older players, players who can execute certain things but not everything, from difficult situations in terms of results to having the extreme highs of winning nearly everything. In terms of coaching experience, Vincent Kompany is a relative newcomer despite having managed Anderlecht, Burnley FC, and now Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: “Top priority” – Romano notes “discussions ongoing” for Arsenal-linked Musiala
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala remains one of the brightest young talents in world football, so it stands to reason why Arsenal would be interested. The 21-year-old, who has a market value of €130m (transfermarkt) is out of contract in summer 2026, and if he doesn’t sign a new contract with Bayern Munich, next summer represents the last […] The post “Top priority” – Romano notes “discussions ongoing” for Arsenal-linked Musiala appeared first on CaughtOffside.
Can Arsenal sign Florian Wirtz from Bayer Leverkusen next summer? As reported by Christian Falk, the midfield maestro wishes to leave B04 next summer in order to compete for titles…

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Florian Wirtz, Victor Boniface, Wojciech Szczesny
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: FC Barcelona, Liverpool, and Manchester City looking closely at Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich; That time Eintracht Frankfurt almost landed Michael Olise; Arsenal eyeing Dušan Vlahović; and MORE!
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is ready to consider committing his future to the Bundesliga giants amidst interest from Barcelona, Liverpool and Manchester City. A look at the rosters and injuries for Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Injury Update: Manuel Neuer fit to play for Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The first-year Bayern head coach has his side off to a perfect start thus far, having won all six matches across all competitions, but now the Bavarians are set to play host to reigning Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen at the Allianz Arena. Despite being expected to play against Werder Bremen last weekend in Bayern’s 5-0 win over Die Grün-Weißen, Ulreich starting for Neuer was a late switch from Kompany as a precaution as to not further aggravate Neuer’s existing problem.

arts.ttl: Report: Borussia Mönchengladbach sporting director Nils Schmadtke set to join Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Following on from recent reports that Bayern Munich is set to release chief scout Markus Pilawa, it seems that, according to Florian Plettenberg the club has found their replacement in Borussia Mönchengladbach’s Nils Schmadtke: Nils Schmadtke is on the verge to become the new overall chief scout of FC Bayern to replace Markus Pilawa.
